name: project-memory
description: Shared project memory skill for cross-agent task context and handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Shared project memory for CLI agents
interface.longDescription: Provides a shared project-memory skill for reading project context, updating current status, recording key decisions, and generating handoff summaries from a common cross-agent memory root.
defaultPrompt: Use project-memory to continue project skills-project-memory.
Use project-memory to read project memory for the current project.
Use project-memory to update the current status for this project.
Use project-memory to generate a handoff summary for this project.
